sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n24646" key="diago/reusis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διαγόρ-ευσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n24646.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">declaration,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.8.42</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
